sections.title: Lunch And Dinner Menu
items: Allergen Note Allergen Note Please inform a manager or Chef's Assistant prior to ordering if someone in your party requires special dietary accommodations

Delicious Delicacies Gluten-free buns are available upon request. Preposterous Poke Noodle*(DS, PS, SFS, TNS)- poke bowl with spicy mayo, blue rice noodles, edamame salad, cucumbers and lotus root Magician Meatball Cone(ES, FS, PS, SES, SFS, TNS)- home-made meatballs and marinara cavatappi, served in a garlic bread cone Roast Beast Bacon Burger(FS, PS, SES, SFS, SS, TNS)- bacon cheeseburger with caramelized onion aioli, tomato and lettuce within a brioche bun and served with crinkle cut fries Meat-za Pizza Burger(FS, PS, SES, SFS, TNS)- pizza-inspired burger topped with salami, pepperoni, mozzarella cheese, within a brioche bun, topped with a mozzarella stick and served with crinkle cut fries Cluck-A-Doodle Waffle Toodle(FS, PS, SES, SFS, TNS)- hand breaded chicken tenders served with a fluffy waffle, crinkle cut fries and mustard mayo BBQ sauce Marvelous Miso Salmon(DS, PS, SFS, TNS)- miso salmon topped with gochujang sauce, accompanied by quinoa with vegetables, edamame puree and cucumber relish Vegan Magician Meatball Cone(DS, ES, FS, PS, SES, SFS, TNS, VG)- plant based Gardein™ meatballs and marinara cavatappi, served in a garlic bread cone Tamed Dragon Salad(DS, ES, FS, GS, PS, SES, SFS, SS, VG)- red dragon fruit, red quinoa, raspberries, mandarin oranges, almonds, baby spinach, cucumber, and guava vinaigrette Slice-a-roni Pepperoni(ES, FS, PS, SES, SFS, TNS)- artisan crust pizza, char cup pepperoni, tangy tomato sauce, mozzarella cheese with crinkle cut fries Cheese on the Flying Trapeze(ES, FS, PS, SES, SFS, TNS, V)- artisan crust pizza, tangy tomato sauce, mozzarella cheese, crinkle cut fries Cheesy Crunch Pretzel Dog(FS, PS, SES, SFS, SS, TNS)- 1/3 pound all beef hot dog, Fritos® Honey BBQ Twists, cheddar cheese sauce, jalapeño relish, BBQ mayo, with crinkle cut fries

Coca-Cola Freestyle® Souvenir Cups Coca-Cola Freestyle® Souvenir Cup - Enjoy more than 100 drink choices and refills thru the day* with the Coca-Cola Freestyle® souvenir cup. Get 3–6 souvenir cups for each, 2 for each, or 1 for at participating Coca-Cola Freestyle® locations. *Valid Coca-Cola Freestyle® Souvenir Cup required to dispense Coca-Cola Freestyle®. Refills are limited to no more than one (1) pour from the Coca-Cola Freestyle® machine per 10 minutes and valid day of purchase only. Sharing is not permitted. Additional restrictions may apply which are subject to change without notice. Extra day of refills for Freestyle® Cup - Add an extra day of refills thru the day* to your previously purchased Coca-Cola Freestyle® Souvenir Cup *Valid Coca-Cola Freestyle® Souvenir Cup required to dispense Coca-Cola Freestyle®. Refills are limited to no more than one (1) pour from the Coca-Cola Freestyle® machine per 10 minutes and valid day of purchase only. Sharing is not permitted. Additional restrictions may apply which are subject to change without notice.
